query:
UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Alif Dhaal Atoll, also known as Southern Ari Atoll, is famous for whale shark encounters and pristine diving conditions. This atoll offers a more secluded and authentic Maldivian experience with excellent house reefs and abundant marine biodiversity.',
  overview = 'Alif Dhaal Atoll is renowned for whale shark encounters and exceptional diving. The atoll features pristine coral reefs, excellent snorkeling, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands.'
WHERE name = 'Alif Dhaal Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Vaavu Atoll is the smallest administrative atoll in the Maldives, comprising Felidhu Atoll and the Vattaru Reef. This intimate atoll offers exceptional diving and snorkeling with pristine coral formations and abundant marine life.',
  overview = 'Vaavu Atoll is the smallest atoll in the Maldives, offering intimate diving and snorkeling experiences with pristine coral reefs and excellent marine biodiversity.'
WHERE name = 'Vaavu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Meemu Atoll is a hidden gem for diving enthusiasts, featuring pristine coral formations and abundant marine life. This atoll offers a more secluded experience away from the crowds, perfect for authentic Maldivian adventures.',
  overview = 'Meemu Atoll is a hidden gem for divers, featuring pristine coral formations and abundant marine life. This atoll offers a secluded experience perfect for diving and snorkeling.'
WHERE name = 'Meemu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Faafu Atoll is a remote and culturally rich atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences. The atoll features pristine beaches, excellent diving and snorkeling, and local islands with traditional Maldivian culture.',
  overview = 'Faafu Atoll is a remote atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences with pristine beaches and excellent diving conditions.'
WHERE name = 'Faafu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Dhaalu Atoll is a remote southern atoll with pristine coral reefs and abundant marine life. This atoll offers excellent diving and snorkeling opportunities in a more secluded setting.',
  overview = 'Dhaalu Atoll is a remote southern atoll featuring pristine coral reefs and excellent diving conditions in a secluded setting.'
WHERE name = 'Dhaalu Atoll';
